Notice Of Motion To Compel Pltf'S Discovery Responses And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-20-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT EMERITUS CORPORATION'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Discovery Responses And Request For Sanctions. Plaintiff's opposition is untimely. Even if considered, however, it does not excuse plaintiff's failure to respond to discovery until after defendant's motion. Plaintiff and her counsel must pay $895.00 in sanctions to defendant. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported = (301/PJB)
